title: Packing Checklist
description: What to pack for Belgium's mild, rainy maritime climate.

items.title: Clothing
items.description: Layer-friendly clothing for a climate that changes quickly through the day.
tips: Waterproof jacket or umbrella (rain is common year-round)
Warm layers for winter (Nov-Feb can be near freezing)
Comfortable walking shoes for cobbled streets

items.title: Electronics
items.description: Belgium uses Type E plugs (230V) — different from India's Type C/D.
tips: Power bank for long train/flight days

items.title: Documents
items.description: Keep essential documents both physically and digitally.
tips: International driving permit if planning to drive
